narrative:
Gibson Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 709 registered voters, with 44.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 53.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 2.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 51.5 percentage points.
